source: Item 17 table (pp.42-46) + Items 6, 11, 12 cross-references; Exhibit FA sections I-XXX referenced but not line-extracted beyond Item 17's 22-row table

grant_and_term.grant: Right to operate a single Restaurant at an approved Location in a specified Territory (FA Sect. I.A)
renewal_conditions: Sign then-current FA with possibly materially different terms

training_and_operations.failure_to_complete_training: Grounds for termination at RFC's option
training_and_operations.on_site_supervision: On-site manager with full time/best efforts required; owner not required to be on-site but recommended

default_and_cross_default.cross_default: Default under Franchise Agreement constitutes default under FDA; lease default is a curable FA default

noncompete.during_term: No involvement in any competing business anywhere (subject to state law) — FA Sect. XIV.A

post_term_fa.scope: Designated area and any other System location

post_term_fda.scope: Designated area and any other System location

noncompete.contradiction_flag: FA 5-mile vs FDA 50-mile post-term variant — unresolved

guaranty.personal_guaranty_detail: Not line-extracted from FA; not explicitly disclosed in Item 17

non_arbitrable_claims: Wisconsin Fair Dealership Act (as amended by AB 218, Ch. 171, 1977 Wisconsin Laws)

insurance.required: Franchisee must maintain insurance; details in FA not individually extracted; Item 6 lists insurance as annual expense

unusual_clauses: Royalty retroactive step-down from 5% to 3.5% if annual gross sales fall below $425,000 — unusual for pizza QSR
RFC may use Marketing Fund money for its own staff salaries and administrative overhead
Non-arbitrable carveout for Wisconsin Fair Dealership Act preserves franchisee's statutory relationship-law rights
1-mile territory with mall and CBD carveouts — franchisor can place a mall Rocky Rococo inside another franchisee's 1-mile zone
FA 5-mile vs FDA 50-mile post-term noncompete contradiction
Zero-rent related-party facility lease to the franchisor is a material unquantified subsidy
